title: [Black Swan Castle, Moat]
description: Gliding between the clumps of aquatic weeds choking the moat, and the inexplicable miniature maelstroms swirling around you, you utter a curse to yourself, inadvertently swallowing a large dose of the nauseating water.  You gag and redouble your efforts to traverse this obstacle.

Clumps of aquatic weeds choke this section of the moat, the hidden underwater roots forming a net for any stray appendage.  Miniature maelstroms swirl inexplicably between the weeds, indicating that there may be more beneath the surface than just roots.
